1.Title: Resounding Drum
1.Description: When the equipper triggers the <color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</color> effect, they gain <color=#2BAD00>2</color> Energy. This effect can trigger once every 10s. When attacking enemies afflicted with an Attribute Anomaly, the equipper deals <color=#2BAD00>11.5%</color> increased DMG.

2.Description: When the equipper triggers the <color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</color> effect, they gain <color=#2BAD00>2.3</color> Energy. This effect can trigger once every 10s. When attacking enemies afflicted with an Attribute Anomaly, the equipper deals <color=#2BAD00>13.2%</color> increased DMG.
